testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate Error: expect(locator).not.toBeVisible() failed Locator: locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!') Expected: not visible Received: visible Timeout: 5000ms Call log: - Expect "not toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!') 8 × locator resolved to

Welcome to My CV Buddy!

- unexpected value "visible" 99 | 100 | // Wait for modal to close > 101 | await expect(page.locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')).not.toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 }) | ^ 102 | console.log('✅ Onboarding completed') 103 | 104 | // ========================================== at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:101:68 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\error-context.md
testcase.system-out:
📍 Step 1: Navigating to signup page... ✅ Signup page loaded with usage limit banner 📍 Step 2: Logging in... ✅ Logged in successfully 📍 Step 3: Checking onboarding modal... ✅ Onboarding modal is mandatory (no skip/close buttons) 📍 Step 4: Completing onboarding steps... ✓ Selected goal: Get a new job
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\test-failed-1.png]]
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\video.webm]]
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\error-context.md]]

testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

testcase.failure:
[firefox] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')
56 | 57 | // Wait for onboarding modal to appear > 58 | await expect(page.locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 }) | ^ 59 | 60 | // Verify 3-step process is shown 61 | await expect(page.locator('text=Upload → Generate → Download')).toBeVisible() at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:58:64
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-firefox\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-firefox\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-firefox\error-context.md

testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Verify image-based PDF rejection
Complete Onboarding Flow › Verify onboarding cannot be skipped

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:271:7 Verify onboarding cannot be skipped

testcase.failure:
[webkit] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:271:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Verify onboarding cannot be skipped
TimeoutError: page.waitForURL: Timeout 15000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "**/dashboard" until "load" ============================================================
277 | await page.click('button[type="submit"]') 278 | > 279 | await page.waitForURL('**/dashboard', { timeout: 15000 }) | ^ 280 | 281 | // Verify onboarding modal appears 282 | await expect(page.locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')).toBeVisible() at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:279:16
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-4545f-nboarding-cannot-be-skipped-webkit\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-4545f-nboarding-cannot-be-skipped-webkit\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-4545f-nboarding-cannot-be-skipped-webkit\error-context.md
